---
title: "coasting"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: 
      version: 4
      bootswatch: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
libs <- c("flexdashboard","DT","tidyverse","plotly","leaflet","leaflet.extras","DBI","lubridate","mapdata","stravR")
purrr::walk(libs, ~library(.,character.only = T))

# clear the memory
rm(list=ls(all = TRUE))

source("config.R")
source("R/load.R")

coastal_data <- load_coastal_data(export_rider_traces = TRUE)

full_dataset <- coastal_data$full_dataset
rides_index <- coastal_data$rides_index
position_extremities <- coastal_data$position_extremities
image_metadata <- coastal_data$image_metadata
riders <- coastal_data$riders
ferries <- coastal_data$ferries

```

Maps
===================================== 

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Miles ridden

```{r}
valueBox(rides_index$distance_miles %>% sum() %>% floor(), icon = "fa-bicycle", color = "#EDF0F1")
```

### Metres climbed

```{r}
valueBox(rides_index$elevation_metres %>% sum() %>% floor(), icon = "fa-arrow-up", color = "#EDF0F1")
```

### Days ridden

```{r}
valueBox(rides_index$start_date %>% unique() %>% length(), icon = "fa-sun", color = "#EDF0F1")
```

### Ferries taken

```{r}
valueBox(nrow(ferries), icon = "fa-ship", color = "#EDF0F1")

```

Row 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Overall progress

```{r}
draw_map("all", full_dataset, rides_index, image_metadata)
```

### Latest ride

```{r}
draw_map("latest", full_dataset, rides_index, image_metadata)
```

Stats
===================================== 

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Most Northerly

```{r}
get_coord_valuebox("N", position_extremities)
```

### Most Southerly

```{r}
get_coord_valuebox("S", position_extremities)
```

### Most Easterly

```{r}
get_coord_valuebox("E", position_extremities)
```

### Most Westerly

```{r}
get_coord_valuebox("W", position_extremities)
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Contributors

```{r}
draw_xp_plot(rides_index)
```

### Miles ridden by hour of day

```{r}
draw_miles_by_hour_plot(full_dataset)
```

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Distance / climb by year

```{r}
draw_miles_climb_plot(rides_index)
```

Rides
===================================== 

Row
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
dt <- rides_index %>% 
  mutate(ride_name_link = str_c("<a href = \"",strava_link,"\">",ride_name,"</a>"),
         ride_start_lbl = as_date(start_date_local),
         distance_miles = if_else(distance_miles > distance_whole_ride_miles, distance_whole_ride_miles, distance_miles)) %>%
  select(ride_name_link, ride_start_lbl, riders, distance_whole_ride_miles, distance_miles, elevation_metres, coastal_percentage)

datatable(dt,
          escape = FALSE,
          colnames =  c("Ride Name", "Ride Date", "Riders", "Total Distance (mi)", "Coastal Distance (mi)", "Elevation (m)", "Percentage Coastal"), 
          rownames = FALSE,
          extensions = 'Scroller', #'Buttons',
          options = list(dom = 'Bfrti',
                         scrollY = 350,
                         pageLength = nrow(rides_index),
                         searchHighlight = TRUE)) %>% 
  formatRound(c("distance_whole_ride_miles", "distance_miles", "elevation_metres"), digits = 1) %>% 
  formatPercentage("coastal_percentage", digits = 1)
```
